Title: Global API Supply Chain Resilience Report 2026
Summary: LentoTech's latest report highlights the shifting landscape of API manufacturing in Southeast Asia and the impact of new regulatory frameworks on global logistics and pricing stability.

Title: New GMP Standards for High-Purity Intermediates
Summary: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has updated its GMP guidelines for chemical intermediates. LentoTech confirms full compliance across all manufacturing facilities as of Q1 2026.

Title: NMN Purity Breakthrough: Achieving 99.9% via HPLC
Summary: Our R&D team has successfully optimized the purification process for Nicotinamide Mononucleotide (NMN), ensuring consistent 99.9% purity levels for premium health supplement formulations.

Title: Strategic Partnership with Global Logistics Leaders
Summary: LentoTech expands its cold-chain logistics network to include direct shipping routes to North America and Europe, reducing lead times for sensitive veterinary APIs by 30%.
